meta.note: Three-tile model. Each paragraph = 3 tiles clicking together. SHARED pools (signposts, view, support, background openers) are reused by every type. TYPE-LOCKED pools (aim, hinge, key expressions, verdict) live inside each type and guarantee a coherent essay — the arrows can only ever land on phrases that match the chosen category.

tileRules.signpost: SHARED. Position-tagged: first | addition | turn. Randomise WITHIN a position bucket so paragraph 2 never says 'Firstly'.
tileRules.view: SHARED. Flat pool, free rotation. Two flavours: 'generalisation' (for for-against / problem-solution / cause-effect) and 'opinion' (for opinion essays).
tileRules.key: TYPE-LOCKED. Free rotation within the type's own pool.
tileRules.support: SHARED. The hidden Reason / Example / Result / Contrast machinery — surfaces only as the asterisk footnote.
tileRules.background: SHARED. The universal opener A-pool, any type.
tileRules.hinge: TYPE-LOCKED (the B move). The link word the essay TITLE naturally pulls toward.
tileRules.aim: TYPE-LOCKED (the C move). The thesis/aim sentence the title points to.

background: There is a growing recognition that ...
It is a well-established fact that ...
Over the past few years there has been a significant increase in ...

opinion: it is my sincere belief that
as far as I can judge,
it is important to acknowledge that

linkers: this is largely due to / owing to

aim: Hence, it is vital to analyse the benefits and drawbacks of ...
Therefore, it is vitally important to consider the advantages and disadvantages of ...
Consequently, it is essential that we study the arguments in favour and against ...
Therefore, it is vital that we analyse the pros and cons of ...

key: the main argument in favour of ...

stance: as far as I can judge,
verdict: the advantages of ... outweigh the disadvantages.
despite some of the views expressed, the benefits of ... are enormous.
even though there are concerns about ..., there should be ...
the positive aspects of ... outweigh the drawbacks.
